delta.text: I
'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm the current state.

content.text: I'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm the current state.
请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

delta.text: I
'm on the home screen. I'll open Settings (设置) to navigate
to brightness settings.

Settings. I need to scroll down to find "显示" (Display) to access brightness settings.

delta.text: I can see the
Display & Brightness page. The brightness slider ("屏幕亮度") appears to be at a high level
(the blue bar is nearly full). "自动调
整亮度" (Auto-brightness) is already OFF, which is good. I
need to drag the brightness slider to the far left (minimum
). Let me get the XML to find the exact coordinates of the slider.

content.text: I can see the Display & Brightness page. The brightness slider ("屏幕亮度") appears to be at a high level (the blue bar is nearly full). "自动调整亮度" (Auto-brightness) is already OFF, which is good. I need to drag the brightness slider to the far left (minimum). Let me get the XML to find the exact coordinates of the slider.
